name: Rakul C Kandavel
summary: Mobile developer with 3+ years of experience building cross-platform applications using React Native, TypeScript, and Expo. Shipped production apps with AI integrations, real-time data, and WCAG accessibility compliance on Firebase, Supabase, and AWS.

experience.title: Lead Developer
bullets: Led mobile development of an AI-powered social shopping platform with React Native, integrating Gemini APIs for virtual try-ons and AI stylist features, driving adoption by 1,000+ active users.
Developed accessible, high-performance iOS and Android interfaces with TypeScript ensuring WCAG compliance.
Engineered real-time data pipelines on Supabase and Firebase supporting thousands of concurrent mobile sessions.
Applied modular micro-architecture and Git workflows to ensure reliability and rapid deployment.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Designed a cross-platform wellness app with React Native integrating Gemini, OpenAI, and Spoonacular APIs for personalized chatbot recommendations.
Supported 500+ monthly active users with real-time personalization workflows on Supabase.
Refactored the codebase into scalable TypeScript modules and optimized state management for mobile performance.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Built a healthcare appointment booking app with React Native and Firebase for real-time scheduling and secure data handling.
Platform adopted by 200+ patients and providers during pilot launch, processing hundreds of bookings without downtime.
Delivered mobile-first UI with React Native and Tailwind improving patient booking engagement by 40%.

experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Developed LSTM-based predictive model for time-series forecasting with 92% accuracy.
Built a web application presenting predictive analytics with WCAG accessibility compliance.
